action_form_set: Select a Form Which form should launch when this button is tapped?
action_message_prompt:
Action type: Send Message Button text: {button} Step 3/4: Enter the message content What message should be sent when the button is clicked?
You can use Markdown formatting: • bold • italic • [link](url)
Send the message content now:
action_referral_confirm: Referral Link action selected for button {button}. Subscribers who tap this button will receive their personal referral link. Choose a button style:
action_seq_pick_prompt: Choose a sequence to enroll subscribers in:
action_seq_pick_prompt_msg: Choose a sequence to enroll subscribers in:
action_submenu_prompt: Action type: Open Submenu Button text: {button} Step 3/3: Select submenu Which menu should open when the button is clicked?
action_updated_message: Action Updated! Button: {button} New action: Send Message Message preview: {preview}...
action_updated_submenu: Action Updated! Button: {button} New action: Open Submenu Target menu: {target}
action_url_prompt:
Action type: Open URL Button text: {button} Step 3/4: Enter the URL What URL should open when the button is clicked?
Examples: • https://example.com • https://t.me/yourchannel
Send the URL now:
change_action_title: Change Button Action Button: {button} Current action: {current} Select new action type:
confirm_delete: Confirm Deletion Are you sure you want to delete this button? Text: {button} Action: {action} This action cannot be undone.
copy_text_prompt: Enter the text to copy to clipboard when this button is tapped:
create_step1: Add New Button Menu: {menu} Step 1/3: Enter button text What text should appear on the button? Examples: • Help & Support • Products • Contact Us • Call Now Send the button text now:
create_step2:
Button text set: {button} Step 2/3: Choose action type What should happen when the subscriber taps this button?
{e_mailbox} Content — send a message, open a URL, launch a form, or show a submenu {e_condition_balance} Monetisation — charge Stars for one-time access or a recurring subscription {e_bot} Automation — enroll/unenroll in sequences, or toggle subscriber tags
edit_color_title: Edit Button Color Button: {button} Current color: {icon} {label} Choose a new color:
edit_text_prompt: Edit Button Text Current text: {button} Send the new button text (max 64 characters):
edit_title: Edit Button Text: {button} Action: {action} {action_info} Color: {color_icon} {color_label} Tap Advanced Settings to control cooldowns, confirmations, and on-click effects. What would you like to change?
inline_only_note_btn: URL & Copy Text: inline keyboards only
list_empty: Button List Menu: {menu} No buttons yet. Add your first button!
list_header: Button List Menu: {menu} Total buttons: {count} Tap a button to edit:
message_set_step4: Message set! Button: {button} Action: Send message Step 4/4: Choose button color Pick a style for this button:
message_too_long: Message is too long. Please keep it under 4096 characters.
multi_post_added: Post {n} added! Send another message to add more posts, or tap Done to finish.
multi_post_first_prompt: Send the first message for this button. You can send multiple messages. When done, tap Done. Supports Markdown: bold, italic, code Send /cancel to abort
no_forms_yet_toast: ⚠️ Create a form first, then add it to a button.
onclick_add_tag_prompt: Enter the tag name to ADD when this button is clicked: Example: buyer
onclick_remove_tag_prompt: Enter the tag name to REMOVE when this button is clicked: Example: prospect
payment_config_saved: Payment button configured! Price: {price} {e_star} Title: {title} {tag_line} Now choose a button style:
payment_description_prompt:
Enter a short description for this payment (max 255 characters).
Shown in the payment dialog — explain what the subscriber is paying for, e.g. Unlock all premium content in this bot.
Send /cancel to abort
payment_price_prompt:
Stars Payment Setup Button: {button} How many Telegram Stars should this cost? (Minimum: 1)
Stars are Telegram's in-app currency. The subscriber pays this amount when they tap the button.
Send /cancel to abort
payment_title_prompt_msg:
Enter a short title for this payment (max 32 characters).

This appears in the Stars payment dialog — e.g. Premium Access

Send /cancel to abort
qr_label_prompt: Enter the button label (text shown to subscribers):
qr_prefill_prompt: Enter the pre-filled message text subscribers will see in the input box:
reorder_title: Reorder Buttons Menu: {menu} Current layout: {preview} Tap any button to select it and start moving.
reorder_title_select: Reorder Buttons Menu: {menu} Current layout: {preview} Button selected! Move it to that slot Swap with that button
seq_prompt: Enter the Sequence ID to enroll the subscriber into:
seq_set_step4: Sequence {seq_name} set for button {button}. Now pick a button style:
submenu_requires_multiple_toast: ⚠️ Create another menu first to use submenus.
submenu_set_step4: Submenu selected: {submenu} Button: {button} Action: Open submenu Step 4/4: Choose button color Pick a style for this button:
tag_prompt: Enter tag name(s) to add (comma-separated, e.g. vip,premium):
text_too_long: Button text is too long (max 64 characters).
toggle_configured:
Toggle button configured successfully!

Now pick a button style:
toggle_label_off_prompt:
What text should the button show when the toggle is OFF? (Subscriber hasn't opted in yet.)
Example: Subscribe
Supports bold, italic, emoji, macros like {first_name}.
toggle_label_on_prompt:
What text should the button show when the toggle is ON? (Subscriber has already opted in.)
Example: Unsubscribe
Supports bold, italic, emoji, macros like {first_name}.
toggle_msg_off_prompt: What message should the bot send when a subscriber deactivates (turns OFF) this toggle? This message confirms the opt-out — e.g. "You've been unsubscribed." Supports formatting, emoji, macros. Send /skip to skip.
toggle_msg_on_prompt: What message should the bot send when a subscriber activates (turns ON) this toggle? This message confirms the action — e.g. "You're subscribed!" Supports formatting, emoji, macros. Send /skip to skip.
toggle_seq_pick_prompt: Choose the sequence this button will toggle enrollment for:
toggle_target_tag_prompt: Enter the tag name to toggle (one tag only): Example: subscribed
toggle_type_prompt: Configure Toggle What should this button toggle?
unenroll_seq_set: Unenroll action set for sequence {seq_name}. Now pick a button style:
url_set_step4_msg:
URL set!

Button: {button}
Action: Open URL

Step 4/4: Choose button color

Pick a style for this button:
url_too_long: URL is too long. Please keep it under 512 characters.
qr_submenu_no_menus: {e_info} No menus found. Create at least one menu first.
